steps.title: Ingest Signals
steps.body: Connect sales history, inventory, promotions, store data, and weather feeds into the forecasting pipeline.
steps.visualContent: flowchart LR; Sales --> FE[Forecasting Engine]; Weather --> FE; Promo --> FE;

steps.title: Feature Engineering
steps.body: Automatic seasonality, lags, and categorical features per product and store hierarchy.
steps.visualContent: Feature store in PostgreSQL powers model training.

steps.title: Train & Forecast
steps.body: Multiple ML models compete; best models produce SKU/store/period forecasts with confidence intervals.
steps.visualContent: Backtested accuracy metrics per hierarchy level.

steps.title: Weather & Promotions
steps.body: Quantify weather impact on demand and measure promotion ROI before you spend.
steps.visualContent: Scenario analysis for campaigns and climate events.

steps.title: Inventory & Insights
steps.body: Stockout risk alerts, optimal stock levels, category trends, and store segmentation dashboards.
steps.visualContent: Hierarchical insights from SKU to category to chain.
